programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.desc: Randall shambles his way onto an all-creature reality show, and a troll wrestles with riddle addiction.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404

programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 18

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 61
programme.desc: Shannon Bennett is back for the semi final, running the pass and offering advice. Contetants must create a three-course menu worthy of a place in the Finale for 20 diners each plus the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Welcome to the Grand Final! Our two gifted finalists enter the kitchen for the last time and they'll have to impress Heston Blumenthal and our judges to win the title of MasterChef 2022 and $250,000!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Hosted by Sarah Wilson, MasterChef Australia gives budding chefs the ultimate once in a lifetime opportunity to develop their cooking skills, get mentored by the best, & ultimately change their lives. Tonight, auditions are held in Sydney & Adelaide.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Auditions move first to Brisbane tonight, where Queensland's hopefuls put their best dish forward. Then in Perth, where there are more restaurants per head than in any other Australian city, the judges are hoping to be bowled over.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Melbourne, the food capital of Australia is the last stop on the nationwide tour before the Top 50 are selected, and the competition moves to Sydney for three days of intense cooking challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tonight the bottom twelve have just 45 minutes to invent a dish that will wow the judges. The pressure hits one contestant who crumbles with nerves and can't even select ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The bottom group find themselves at Sydney's famous fish markets for a high octane challenge against the clock. With just two hours to shop, get back to the kitchen and cook a two course seafood meal, the pace is fast and furious for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a tough week those that remain in the Top 50 have one last challenge to prove their worth. Each contestant has a box of ten mystery ingredients including pork, chocolate, bread and cabbage and just 30 minutes to prepare a judge worthy dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arriving in Sydney, the contestants are taken to their luxury $16M pad and immediately into the MasterChef kitchen. Put straight to task, the Top 20 are given a set of ingredients and have just one hour to whip up a chicken dish of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Fresh from the first challenge win, one contestant gets the opportunity to compete against a celebrity chef. Both Chef's make the same dish and the judges will blind taste each. If the contestant makes a 'better' dish, they will fastrack to the finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tonight, both teams are challenged to run their own Sushi train, serving real paying customers. They are responsible for everything, from creating the delicate dishes, to drumming up business and making sure their respective patrons are happy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The losing team from last night's challenge must deliberate on their weakest member. Assessing each other's performances during challenges and judging each other on teamwork, the contestants must decide who will be the first to leave MasterChef Australia.

programme.desc: Sonya can't wait to be in the Umi City Toy Boat Race. But just as the race is about to begin, Sonya's boat begins sailing out of control, and all kinds of things go wrong.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Todos los animales del bosque irán a la gran fiesta en la casita del árbol. Dora y Botas deberán cruzar el Lago Cocodrilo, pasar por encima de la Muralla de Piedra y así podrán ir ellos también a festejar.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla’s barn.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Darington has built the ultimate stunt-track, and every Monster Machine in town is coming to see the show! But when a jealous Crusher tricks Darington and sends him far, far away, it’s up to Blaze and AJ to rescue him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Plankton replaces his computer wife Karen with the new, Karen 2, the original Karen ends up working at the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob can't get to sleep & asks Patrick for help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 20
programme.desc: SpongeBob & Patrick make a bet to see who can hold a funny face the longest...then their faces freeze that way! SpongeBob & Patrick spend one last glorious day at Glove World before it closes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: When Squidward goes home sick with a fake illness, SpongeBob HypochondriacPants thinks he's caught it for real! Mrs. Puff finally finds a use for SpongeBob's reckless driving.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 22
programme.desc: SpongeBob brings home a box of new snail treats that Gary will do anything to get - especially when they run out. Meanwhile, Plankton wins a free Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 23
programme.desc: SpongeBob inadvertently helps Plankton enact his plot to put all of Bikini Bottom on Santa's naughty list & now has to stop Plankton before he gets his Christmas wish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then- the world! Squidward quits the Krusty Krab to work for Plankton, turning the Chum Bucket into an overnight success.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants all of Bikini Bottom to eat at the Krusty Krab. Later, Mr. Krabs and Plankton circulate petitions to see which restaurant will get bulldozed by the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 26
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them - and their world tour - himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 179

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 180
programme.desc: Patrick becomes a superhero // Gary becomes obsessed with his new red ball, forcing SpongeBob to take drastic measures to intervene.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 181
programme.desc: SpongeBob is forced to go back to the milkshake academy // SpongeBob and Patrick must look after Squidward after he hits his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 182
programme.desc: Squidward finds a good book which happens to be SpongeBob's private diary // Mrs. Puff is again teaching SpongeBob to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 183
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a nasty sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab // Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 184
programme.desc: An imprisoned Plankton tries to break out of jail and steal the secret formula // Spongebob replaces his broken spatula with a magical one from Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 185
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom - except for Plankton, who plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 186
programme.desc: Mr Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank // Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 187
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain // There's ghostly goings-on

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 188
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero // Mr Krabs spins the story of the monstrous Yeti Crab which eats lazy workers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 189
programme.desc: SpongeBob, You're Fired!: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob. Unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work doing anything, anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 190

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 192

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 193
programme.desc: SpongeBob cares for the stray snails that start appearing // Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 194

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 195
programme.desc: SpongeBob's life changes in unexpected ways // When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 196
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick's behaviour in 'The Fishbowl', and then in 'Married to Money', Mr Krabs takes Plankton's advice and finally marries the only thing he ever loved... money!

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The search is on for Megan's two front teeth after she loses them in an epic- fail bike stunt. Sanjay's grandmother gives the dudes a conquistador statue from Darlene's childhood - and it seems to have a mind of its own.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 8

programme.desc: Buhdeuce gets robot arms to help him mine bread in 'Robot Arms', and then in 'PB & J', the guys adopt a Ponda Bear, who seems like a cute, sweet pet... but he's actually quite the opposite.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 8

programme.desc: Jimmy creates an electronic bodyguard to protect him from a bully./Jimmy helps Sheen find his missing Ultra-Lord action figure.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 220
programme.desc: The Loud sisters enlist The Master of Convincing (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her kindergarten report card back to discover she's gotten an F - in social skills. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S2 Ep. 11

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 216
programme.desc: With prankster Luan at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they're safe. That is, until they break down in front of an unusual motel./The kids discover Dad isn't at his IT job anymore and is now a dishwasher.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: At the parent-child picnic, Jimmy gives his dad a bionic sweatband to help their team beat Cindy's. At the parent-child picnic, Jimmy gives his dad a bionic sweatband to help their team beat Cindy's.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Jimmy attacks the earth's atmosphere with sun block to end Retroville's heatwave causing a second ice age instead. Jimmy creates musical instruments that play based on thought waves to beat Cindy and Libby in a school talent show.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 19

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Helga tries to hide her disappointment at not being invited to Rhonda's makeover party. She gives herself her own makeover and crashes the party with the neighborhood boys in tow, trying to out girlie-girl everyone else at the party.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. The only problem is, she accidentally goes to the wrong French restaurant.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Helga has been secretly building a shrine in her closet to Arnold. She has been collecting his combs, old school photos, used band-aids and chewing gum, but only one thing will make the shrine complete: Arnold's hat.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When it looks like Otto will make the cover of Gnarly Surf Magazine, Reggie is angry because the photographer doesn't think girls can surf.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts!/Timmy makes magic "You Doo" dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 63

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: TV's Adam West, star of the superhero series "Catman," never had a real childhood. Timmy wishes that Adam could become a kid again. / Timmy wishes Cosmo and Wanda were Tootie's birthday fairies for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 15

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Norb befriends Stump (an actual tree stump). Despite Dag's jealousy Norb realizes he has not lost a brother, but gained a friend.
